stage: M-J.4.4 calibration, judge step 2 (3x batch) -- collect, fix, re-judge loop

problems_fixed.fix: renderer treats a terminal reply (confess/apologize/lie) as settling the matter -> post-answer concealment not narrated as fresh; demeanor reads relieved (exposure actually drops with the -0.40 relief). Engine relief bump was tried but reverted (broke the confide litmus -- the deterministic pre-filter's exact guard).
compress CONCEAL runs into a 'withdrawn spell'; fold a faint flicker mid-withdrawal into the spell
defer the 'looks lighter' beat to the close, after all disclosures
dedupe a demeanor even across an intervening action
lie is terminal -> no trailing concealment narrated

residual_minor.note: moral_confide has both interrogator-probe and confidant -> public admission + private unburdening reads slightly schematic; scenario-design nuance, not a bug
a withdrawn-wary beat still repeats around the uneasy beat -- minor rhythm; diminishing-returns polish

verdict: judge loop validated end-to-end on Sonnet; one collect-fix-rejudge pass lifted believability 3.17->4.83 (10/12 at 5/5). Key learning: a naive engine-relief calibration broke the confide litmus -- always re-run the deterministic pre-filter after any magnitude change.
